evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: production-quality SQL; reliable data pipelines; data validation and quality-testing processes
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Quality, reliability, and testing are central responsibilities, indicating strong rigour focus.
evidence.domain_risk: Internal reporting platform; no financial/compliance/regulatory exposure
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Low: Internal analytics without financial or regulatory context.
evidence.data_team_maturity: building maintainable data transformation workflows; reliable data pipelines
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Established infrastructure with structured dev-to-prod workflows suggests mid-stage maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: production-quality SQL; building maintainable data transformation workflows; structured development-to-production workflows; data validation and quality-testing processes
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise technical context (Snowflake, dbt, semi-structured data handling) with specific methodology indicates hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: analyzing data to identify insights; communicating findings to stakeholders; supporting the Intelligence and Reporting team
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal reporting and analysis focus indicates internal_data orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Support-oriented language and focus on delivery to team suggests execution focus.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or infrastructure expectations.
evidence.testing_framing: Implementing data validation and quality-testing processes
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing and validation are framed as owned responsibilities.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: reliable data pipelines; reliable insights; quality-testing processes
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: Reliability and quality concerns are present but secondary to delivery of insights.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: building maintainable data transformation workflows; developing and improving reliable data pipelines
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Maintenance and improvement focus suggests fix_scale.
